LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY, CARPENTERS PENSION, CARPENTERS ANNUITY, CARPENTERS TRAINING, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY, CARPENTERS PENSION, CARPENTERS ANNUITY, CARPENTERS TRAINING, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
